title: Better 1.21
description: PvP focused Resource Pack that improves the appearance
body:
![Better 1.21](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5e8f66a22ff460ea3200848e0ecb625a26d4efc6.png)
# Enhance your entire journey!

This pack combines style, clarity, and performance to give you a smoother and more immersive experience. Whether you love survival, building, or PvP, every detail has been refined to make gameplay more enjoyable:

- 🌌 A stunning purple sky that makes every sunrise and sunset unforgettable.

- ⚔️ Short swords designed to keep your vision clear in combat.

- 🧱 Clean and simplified wool textures for a brighter, more polished world.

- 🖥️ A modern and user-friendly GUI for easier navigation.

- 🔥 Optimized PvP textures to keep fights sharp and exciting.

- ✨ Smooth high-resolution fonts that improve readability everywhere.

With this combination, your game looks cleaner, feels more modern, and stays PvP-ready while still perfect for casual play. ✨
